titleStmt.title: SII 23.602: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 602. (A.R. No. 602 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—On the base of the same gōpura, right of entrance Kulōttuṅga III. Year 36: 1213-14 A.D.

summary.p: The cyclic year Śrīmukha corresponding to the 36th regnal year makes the inscription assignable to Kulōttuṅga III. The record is incomplete and registers some provision made by one Tirumūla-Reḍḍiruvi a nephew of Madhurāntaka Dēśi-Reḍḍi of Mēṟpākkai in Mēṟpākkai-nāḍu for the daily offering of tiruppōṉagam to god Vēdanāyaka-Perumāḷ installed by him at Nirandanūr, in a shrine of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa
devaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 Āvatāna śrīmuka cammaṟcarattu Ayp
paci mācam Atirājentiramaṇṭalattu meṟpākkai
nāṭṭu merppākkaiyān śrīmaṉ maturāntaka tecire
ṭṭiyān marumakan tirumulareṭṭiruviyeṉ niranta
nūril nāṉ Ukantaṟuḷuvitta vetanāyakapperumāḷu
kku nittam Oru tiruppoṉakam Oru tūm pariciyāl
Amutupaṭi cantrātittavarai celuttuvatāka Iva
Digital edition of SII 23.602 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
